tasks.title: Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor
tasks.description: Read the source code located at `../claude-code-sourcemap`. Summarize its core features, user experience, architecture highlights, and any gaps that could inspire improvements for our product. Produce a Markdown file named `claude-code-summary.md` in `target/temp/swarmout` containing the analysis.

tasks.title: Analyze Copilot-CLI Competitor
tasks.description: Examine the codebase located at `../copilot-cli` (or the repository if available). Identify key functionalities, command patterns, integration points, and any weaknesses or unmet needs. Write the results to `copilot-cli-summary.md` in `target/temp/swarmout`.

tasks.title: Analyze OpenCode Competitor
tasks.description: Review the source located at `../opencode`. Extract and document its feature set, design strengths, and areas where it falls short compared to our target market. Save the findings as `opencode-summary.md` in `target/temp/swarmout`.

tasks.title: Analyze RookCode Competitor
tasks.description: Locate the RookCode repository (assumed at `../roocode`). Summarize its offerings, unique selling points, and limitations. Output the analysis to `roocode-summary.md` in `target/temp/swarmout`.

tasks.title: Generate SWARMOUT2.md Plan & Recommendations
tasks.description:
1. Review our product specifications and available features.
2. Study the four competitor summary files created in the previous tasks.
3. Identify feature gaps in our product that competitors address.
4. Draft actionable feature additions, including high‑level milestones and detailed tasks for each milestone.
5. Compile all findings, recommendations, and the implementation roadmap into a single Markdown document named `SWARMOUT2.md`.
6. Place the final document in `target/temp/swarmout`.
The output file should start with a summary of competitor strengths, then list suggested features, followed by a structured roadmap with milestones and associated tasks.
